title: Alternative Stained Glass Connect
description: The connected textures **resource pack** for "Alternative Stained Glass".
body:
![Connected textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7928ccfe20ac952242ae1e2ea9559e835eb6014f.png)

# Resource Pack for "Alternative Stained Glass" mod

[EN]  
The **resource pack** makes "[Alternative Stained Glass](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternative-stained-glass)" mod compatible with OptiFine connected textures.

[JP]  
これは "[Alternative Stained Glass](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternative-stained-glass)" modをOptiFineのConnected Texturesに対応させるための**リソースパック**です。

# REQUIRES

- Minecraft 1.7.10
- Forge 10.13.4.1614
- OptiFine (Tested in [OptiFine 1.7.10 HD U D4](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.7.10_HD_U_D4.jar))
- [Alternative Stained Glass (Mod)](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternative-stained-glass)
